title: Ruizia ferruginea

The plant is valued for its traditional medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Ruizia ferruginea include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for the plant's medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Ruizia ferruginea is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as extracts and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
